provisions.title: Service Fee
provisions.content:
ANNEX
 attached to the Joint Prakas, No 991 MEF.PRK, dated December 28, 2012
 on the Provision of Public Services of the Council for the Development of Cambodia
 No Description Service Fee processing Validity

 day)

 or Coastal Project

36 Site visit new investment project regardless number of visit)

 - More than 201 Km 10,000,000
